name.en-US: Little Office of the Blessed Virgin Mary According to the Carthusian Usage

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of Blessed Virgin Mary According to the Carthusian Usage, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US:
Officium privatum gloriosissimae Dei Genetricis
Ad omnes horas et omni tempore dicitur prorsus sicut hic descriptum est.
